title: Shuffleworks — Free Dice, Coin, Wheel & Team Tools
description: Free online randomizers for game night and quick decisions. Roll 3D dice, flip a coin, spin a wheel, make teams, draw cards, shuffle colors, or play rock paper scissors.
name: Shuffleworks

title: Color Team Shuffler — Split Colors Into Teams
description: Shuffle yellow, purple, blue, and red 3D color cards into two clear teams. A fast, visual team picker for FIFA, couch tournaments, and game night.
name: Color Team Shuffler

title: 3D Dice Roller — D4, D6, D8, D10, D12 & D20
description: Roll up to six realistic 3D dice online. Choose D4, D6, D8, D10, D12, or D20 dice, see every face and total, and keep a local roll history.
name: 3D Dice Roller

title: Random Spinner Wheel — Add Choices & Spin
description: Make a custom random spinner wheel with up to 24 choices. Add names, meals, games, or decisions and spin for a smooth, fair result.
name: Random Spinner Wheel

title: Coin Flip Online — Heads or Tails with History
description: Flip a realistic animated coin online for a fair heads-or-tails decision. Track the current streak and review the previous five flips.
name: Online Coin Flip

title: Random Team Generator — Split Names Into 2–10 Teams
description: Enter player names and create two to ten balanced random teams. Rename each team and share the exact team lineup with one link.
name: Random Team Generator

title: Random Card Draw — Shuffle a 52-Card Deck
description: Shuffle a complete playing-card deck and draw one to five cards online without replacement. The animated deck keeps track of every remaining card.
name: Random Card Draw

title: Rock Paper Scissors Online — Play a Quick Round
description: Play rock paper scissors against the computer with a classic three-shake reveal. Choose your move and keep score across quick rounds.
name: Rock Paper Scissors
